title: AuditAnchorPreflightGetResponse
description: Broker-owned local anchor preflight response with latest anchorable seal and readiness/requirement posture.

latest_anchorable_seal.description: Latest sealed segment identity currently anchorable by the explicit broker-owned anchor action.

segment_id.description: Latest sealed segment identity anchorable by the explicit anchor path.

seal_digest.description: Digest identity of the latest anchorable segment seal.

signer_readiness.description: Signer dependency readiness for the explicit audit-anchor action.

ready.description: Whether audit-anchor signer dependencies are ready.

presence_mode.description: Resolved signer presence mode when signer readiness is available.

signer_logical_scope.description: Resolved signer logical scope for audit-anchor signing.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable signer readiness reason code when not ready.

verifier_readiness.description: Verifier-material readiness for authoritative audit verification after anchoring.

ready.description: Whether audit verifier material is ready for authoritative verification.

reason_code.description: Machine-readable verifier readiness reason code when not ready.

presence_requirements.description: User-presence requirement posture for the active signer mode.

required.description: Whether explicit user-presence attestation is required for the active signer mode.

attestation_mode.description: Presence mode used to determine attestation requirement posture.

attestation_ready.description: Whether required attestation token generation is currently available.

approval_requirements.description: Policy-derived approval requirement posture for anchoring the latest anchorable seal.

required.description: Whether latest policy requires explicit approval for the latest anchorable seal.

required_assurance_level.description: Required approval assurance level when approval is required.

policy_decision_ref.description: Policy decision digest/ref used for approval requirement derivation.
